---
title: "Minstrelsy of the Scottish Border: consisting of historical and romantic ballads, collected in the southern counties of Scotland; with a few of modern date"
---

## Minstrelsy of the Scottish Border: consisting of historical and romantic ballads, collected in the southern counties of Scotland; with a few of modern date

**Author:** Sir Walter Scott
**Date:** 1802-1803
**Imprint:** Kelso: Ballantyne

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
